top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE g.gender IN ('Male', 'Female');

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE g.gender IN ('Male', 'Female');

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id
WHERE g.gender IN ('Male', 'Female');

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Male' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN g.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS male_to_female_ratio
FROM superhero s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.id;
